name: POLITICO Policy Outlook: Powering 6G
notes: Telecom/tech policy briefing with Rep. Doris Matsui. In-person and virtual options. Relevant for tech-adjacent clients.

name: Saint Patrick's Day Reception with Kerrygold
location: 700 Pennsylvania Ave SE, 7th Floor, Washington, DC
notes: St. Patrick's Day reception. RSVP via email to pgaul@akingump.com.

name: Pop-Up Conversation with Rep. Erin Houchin
notes: 8:30-9:15am briefing with Rep. Houchin (R-IN), Financial Services Committee member. In-person or virtual. Relevant for Carta/fintech clients.

name: Housewives on the Hill: HIV Prevention
location: Russell Senate Office Building, Room 325, Washington, DC
notes: HIV prevention policy briefing at Russell 325. Relevant for health care clients.

name: State of Retail & the Consumer Reception
location: Ned's Club, 734 15th St NW, 9th Floor, Washington, DC
notes: Retail policy reception 5-7pm. Highly relevant for Albertsons/ACI retail and consumer policy work.

name: America First Antitrust Forum
notes: Full-day antitrust forum 12-5pm. Relevant for Albertsons/ACI competition and ORC policy work.

location: Capitol Hill Club, 1st Floor, Washington, DC
notes: Policy briefing and networking reception 4:30-7:30pm at Capitol Hill Club. Good cross-sector networking.

name: POLITICO Pub at CERAWeek
notes: Energy policy reception running March 22-25 alongside CERAWeek. Good energy sector networking.

name: Agri-Pulse Ag & Food Policy Summit
notes: Full-day summit with House Ag Chair GT Thompson, Senate Ag Chair Boozman, Ranking Member Klobuchar. Followed by customer appreciation reception. Highly relevant for Albertsons/ACI farm bill and food policy work.

notes: Virtual webinar on FDA/USDA food policy, emerging agency signals, and Congressional developments. Relevant for Albertsons/ACI food and nutrition policy work.

location: Sonoma Restaurant and Wine Bar, 223 Pennsylvania Ave SE, Washington, DC
notes: Women's History Month panel and toast 5-7pm at Sonoma. Good networking opportunity.

location: ART DC - Arlo Hotel Rooftop Bar, Washington, DC
notes: NVCA rooftop reception 5:30-8:30pm. Highly relevant for Carta and private markets/fintech clients.

notes: Half-day AI summit with Rep. Kat Cammack. Mainstage 2:10-5pm, reception to 7pm. Relevant for NobleReach and tech-adjacent clients.

name: POLITICO's Economy Summit
notes: Economic policy summit. Relevant for Carta, Albertsons, and fintech clients.

name: Leadership Connects Tech & Innovation Happy Hour

notes: Tech and innovation happy hour 5:30-7:30pm. Relevant for NobleReach and tech policy clients.

notes: Annual health care summit. Highly relevant for Alliance for Care at Home client.
